settings.text: Got questions? We've got answers. Find everything you need to know about shopping with Lumu below.

settings.heading: How long does delivery take?
settings.row_content: Standard delivery takes 3-5 business days across Pakistan. Major cities like Karachi, Lahore, and Islamabad typically receive orders within 2-3 business days.

settings.heading: Is shipping really free?
settings.row_content: Yes! We offer free standard shipping on all orders over Rs 2,000. Orders below Rs 2,000 have a flat shipping fee of Rs 150.

settings.heading: How can I track my order?
settings.row_content: Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking number via SMS and email. You can also track your order from your account page on our website.

settings.heading: Do you deliver to all cities in Pakistan?
settings.row_content: Yes! We deliver nationwide across Pakistan through our trusted courier partners. Whether you're in a major city or a smaller town, we've got you covered.

settings.heading: What is your return policy?
settings.row_content: We offer a 7-day hassle-free return policy. If you're not satisfied with your purchase, simply initiate a return within 7 days of delivery and we'll process your refund.

settings.heading: How do I return an item?
settings.row_content: Contact our support team via WhatsApp or email with your order number. We'll arrange a pickup from your address at no extra cost.

settings.heading: When will I receive my refund?
settings.row_content: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive and inspect the returned item. The amount will be credited to your original payment method.

settings.heading: What payment methods do you accept?
settings.row_content: We accept Cash on Delivery (COD), credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard), bank transfers, JazzCash, and EasyPaisa. All online payments are secured with SSL encryption.

settings.heading: Is Cash on Delivery available?
settings.row_content: Yes, Cash on Delivery (COD) is available nationwide across Pakistan. Simply select COD at checkout and pay when your order arrives.

settings.heading: Are my payment details safe?
settings.row_content: Absolutely. Our website is protected with industry-standard SSL encryption. We never store your card details on our servers. All transactions are processed through secure, PCI-compliant payment gateways.

settings.text: Our support team is available 24/7 to help. Reach out to us anytime via our contact page or WhatsApp.
